rationale: Educ. Code §39.056 governs TEA monitoring reviews of school districts. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 39.056. MONITORING REVIEWS. (a) The commissioner may direct the agency to conduct monitoring reviews and random on-site visits of a school district at any time as authorized by Section 7.028.
_note: Rule text concerns school district monitoring reviews only; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
